prompt: A Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock print of a lone traveler descending a large mountain in curved steps toward a valley. The landscape shows layered hills and a clear downward path. Flat colors, bold outlines, minimal shading, Edo period composition. Muted indigo, green, and beige palette. Stylized natural forms, traditional woodblock texture. No text, no modern elements.
tradition_approach: Used flat colors, bold outlines, stylized contours, and limited palette to depict descent as a natural journey downhill.
